title: Corporate Sustainability Due Diligence and ESG in a Global Context
further_info: Recommended Reading • Alibrandi, A. S., Frigeni, C., & Schneider, G. Conduct Risk as a Possible Approach for Enhancing Awareness and Management of ESG-Related Risks. • Armstrong, A., (2020) “Ethics and ESG”, Australasian Accounting, Business and Finance Journal 14(3), 6-17. doi: https://doi.org/10.14453/aabfj.v14i3.2 • Benlemlih, Mohammed, and Isabelle Girerd-Potin. (2017). Corporate social responsibility and firm financial risk reduction: On the moderating role of the legal environment. Journal of Business Finance & Accounting, 44(7-8), 1137-1166. • Och, M. (2023). The EU Taxonomy Regulation and the prevention of greenwashing. University of Genoa EUSFiL Law Research Working Paper Series, (17). Anrechenbar für: - BA-M 6 (Seminar): 6 ECTS (benotet) - BA-M 9.1 oder 9.3: 2 ECTS (unbenotet), 6 ECTS (benotet) - BA-B 6: 2 ECTS (unbenotet) Eine hiervon abweichende ECTS-Vergabe ist nicht mögliich.
